title: oenothera muricata subsp. germanica
intro: Oenothera muricata subsp. germanica, also known as Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Onagraceae. It is native to Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Oenothera muricata subsp. germanica include reducing symptoms of menopause and premenstrual syndrome, improving skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and alleviating inflammation and pain associated with conditions like arthritis. Herbal preparations of Evening Primrose include oil extracted from its seeds, which can be used topically or taken internally as a dietary supplement.
